case_title: MARCUS CAMPOS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO MARCUS CAMPOS ON 09/18/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 10/24/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DISMISSAL IS ENTERED. NEW COURT DATE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS JUN-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARCUS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAMPOS, MARCUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $0. THE VIDEO DEMONSTRATES THAT PLAINTIFF BACKED INTO THE BUS WHEN THE BUS WAS STOPPED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $586.00 FILED BY CAMPOS, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SEE SIGNATURE SERVED JUL-30-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REMARK:SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO:DEFENDANT - CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLTF. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARLEENA GREEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
